old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-rg8t","title":"[security] Weak/Forgeable CRC32 MIC fallback in link layer (P0)","description":"lichen/subsys/lichen/link/lichen_link_rx.c:verify_mic() and lichen_l2.c accept CRC32 \"MIC\" when !has_link_key or CONFIG_LICHEN_LINK_INSECURE_CRC32_MIC=y. CRC32 is trivial to forge (no auth). Enables frame injection, spoofing, bypass of Schnorr-48. Dev configs and no-key paths deploy this in prod. See Kconfig warnings, replay.c comments, spec/06-security.md. Matches \"weak MIC (e.g. CRC32 in prod)\". new_value: Fixed by removing insecure CRC32 MIC config and fallback; enforced mandatory Schnorr-48 signatures on all frames in TX/RX; updated all comments, Kconfig, board configs, and docs. Commit 9897483
